title: hyptis involucrata
intro: Hyptis involucrata, also known as bushy hyptis or false dragonhead, is a perennial plant species native to the Americas, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Hyptis involucrata can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
